title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in Mount Pleasant, NY
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Mount Pleasant, Westchester. Humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Mount Pleasant residents facing bat intrusions need professional, humane removal services that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Our bat removal and exclusion specialists serve the entire Mount Pleasant area, from Hawthorne to Valhalla, providing comprehensive solutions for residential and commercial properties. We safely remove bats and seal entry points to prevent future infestations in your Mount Pleasant home or business.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of bat removal experience to Mount Pleasant, with certified wildlife technicians who understand the unique challenges of Westchester County properties. We offer guaranteed exclusion work, humane removal practices, and competitive pricing with transparent estimates for all Mount Pleasant residents.
localContext: Mount Pleasant's mix of older residential neighborhoods and wooded areas near Kensico Reservoir creates ideal conditions for bat colonies seeking attic and chimney roosts. From historic homes in Pleasantville to newer developments near the Taconic State Parkway, our team has experience with all property types common to the Mount Pleasant area.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Mount Pleasant, NY?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Mount Pleasant typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the complexity of your property. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Mount Pleasant and Westchester County?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal must follow New York State DEC regulations. Bats cannot be excluded during maternity season (May 1 - August 15) when flightless young are present. Our licensed technicians ensure all removal work complies with local and state wildlife laws.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Mount Pleasant home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, brown staining around openings, and seeing bats enter or exit your home at twilight. We offer professional inspections to confirm bat presence and identify entry points.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our exclusion process includes a thorough inspection, installation of one-way bat valves that allow bats to exit but not re-enter, sealing all secondary entry points, cleanup of guano and contaminated insulation if needed, and a warranty on our exclusion work to ensure bats don't return to your Mount Pleasant property.
